option.name: filePath
option.value: /ChatBotTemplate (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /LoginContent (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /MainActivity (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
name: CI
on: push: branches: - release/* pull_request: branches: - release/* workflow_dispatch: issues: types: [opened]
jobs: # lint: # if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') # runs-on: ubuntu-latest # steps: # - name: Checkout the code # uses: actions/checkout@v4 # # - name: Set up JDK 17 # uses: actions/setup-java@v4 # with: # java-version: '17' # distribution: 'temurin' # cache: 'gradle' # # - name: Install google-services.json (from secret) # env: # GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} # run: | # echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json # # - name: Grant execute permission for gradlew # run: chmod +x ./gradlew # # - name: Run Lint # run: ./gradlew lint --parallel --build-cache # # - name: Debug artifacts # run: ls -R app/build/reports # # - name: Upload html test report # uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 # with: # name: lint-report # path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html # # - name: Clean sensitive files # if: ${{ always() }} # run: rm -f app/google-services.json # # unit-test: # if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') # #needs: [ lint ] # runs-on: ubuntu-latest # steps: # - name: Checkout the code # uses: actions/checkout@v4 # # - name: Set up JDK 17 # uses: actions/setup-java@v4 # with: # java-version: '17' # distribution: 'temurin' # cache: 'gradle' # # - name: Install google-services.json (from secret) # env: # GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} # run: | # echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json # # - name: Grant execute permission for gradlew # run: chmod +x ./gradlew # # - name: Run tests # run: ./gradlew test --parallel --build-cache # # - name: Upload test report # uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 # with: # name: unit_test_report # path: app/build/reports/tests/testDebugUnitTest/ # # - name: Clean sensitive files # if: ${{ always() }} # run: rm -f app/google-services.json
# instrumentation-test: # if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') # #needs: [ unit-test ] # runs-on: ubuntu-latest # strategy: # matrix: # api-level: [ 29 ] # steps: # - name: Checkout the code # uses: actions/checkout@v4 # # - name: Set up JDK 17 # uses: actions/setup-java@v4 # with: # java-version: '17' # distribution: 'temurin' # cache: 'gradle' # # - name: Install google-services.json (from secret) # env: # GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} # run: | # echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json # # - name: Grant execute permission for gradlew # run: chmod +x ./gradlew # # - name: Enable KVM (acelera el emulador Android) # run: | # echo 'KERNEL=="kvm", GROUP="kvm", MODE="0666", OPTIONS+="static_node=kvm"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/99-kvm4all.rules # sudo udevadm control --reload-rules # sudo udevadm trigger --name-match=kvm # # - name: Run espresso tests # uses: reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2 # with: # api-level: 29 # target: default # arch: x86_64 # profile: Nexus 6 # emulator-options: -no-snapshot-save -no-window -gpu swiftshader_indirect -noaudio -no-boot-anim -camera-back none # disable-animations: true # script: ./gradlew connectedCheck --build-cache --stacktrace # # - name: Upload test report # if: always() # uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 # with: # name: instrumentation_test_report # path: app/build/reports/androidTests/connected/ # # - name: Clean sensitive files # if: ${{ always() }} # run: rm -f app/google-services.json
sonar: if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/main') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/') #needs: [ instrumentation-test ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4 with: fetch-depth: 0
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'gradle'
- name: Install google-services.json (from secret) env: GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} run: | echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Build debug + coverage only (avoid release signing in CI) run: ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest :app:jacocoTestReport :app:assembleDebug --parallel --build-cache
- name: Check SonarQube availability (self-hosted) env: SONAR_HOST_URL: ${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} run: | if [ -z "$SONAR_HOST_URL" ]; then echo "❌ Falta el secret SONAR_HOST_URL" exit 1 fi for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "SonarQube health check $i/5 -> $SONAR_HOST_URL" if curl -fsS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 20 "$SONAR_HOST_URL/api/system/status" > /dev/null; then echo "✓ SonarQube reachable" exit 0 fi sleep 8 done echo "❌ SonarQube unreachable from GitHub runner" exit 1
- name: SonarQube Scan (self-hosted) env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} run: | ./gradlew app:sonar \ -Dsonar.host.url=${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} \ -Dsonar.projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin \ -Dsonar.token=${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} \ -Dsonar.gradle.skipCompile=true \ --no-daemon
- name: Check SonarQube Quality Gate env: SONAR_HOST_URL: ${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} run: | # SonarQube CE no soporta branch analysis -> no usar &branch= # Esperamos más tiempo para que el procesamiento del scan termine echo "⏳ Esperando que SonarQube procese el análisis..." sleep 20
QG_URL="${SONAR_HOST_URL}/api/qualitygates/project_status?projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin" echo "Consultando: $QG_URL"
# Capturar respuesta completa para debug RESPONSE=$(curl -s \ --user "${SONAR_TOKEN}:" \ --header "Accept: application/json" \ --connect-timeout 15 \ --max-time 30 \ "$QG_URL")
echo "Respuesta raw: $RESPONSE"
# Verificar que la respuesta es JSON válido if ! echo "$RESPONSE" | jq . > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "❌ La respuesta no es JSON válido (¿Cloudflare challenge?)" echo "Respuesta recibida: $RESPONSE" exit 1 fi
status=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.projectStatus.status // "NULL"') echo "Quality gate status: $status"
if [ "$status" = "OK" ]; then echo "✓ Quality gate passed" elif [ "$status" = "NONE" ] || [ "$status" = "NULL" ]; then echo "⚠️ Quality gate sin datos aún (primer análisis o sin cobertura configurada) — continuando" else echo "❌ Quality gate failed: $status" exit 1 fi
- name: Upload coverage report uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: coverage-report path: app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/jacocoTestReport.xml
- name: Upload APK for Firebase distribution uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: app-debug-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk retention-days: 1
- name: Clean sensitive files if: ${{ always() }} run: rm -f app/google-services.json
Firebase: needs: [ sonar ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Download APK artifact uses: actions/download-artifact@v4 with: name: app-debug-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/
- name: Set up Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: '18'
- name: Install Firebase CLI run: npm install -g firebase-tools
- name: Decode service account key run: | echo "${{ secrets.FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_BASE64 }}" | base64 -d > firebase-key.json
- name: Upload to Firebase App Distribution env: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS: ${{ github.workspace }}/firebase-key.json run: | firebase appdistribution:distribute app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \ --app ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_APP_ID }} \ --groups "qa" \ --release-notes "Versión enviada desde CI automáticamente."
- name: Clean up if: always() run: | rm -f firebase-key.json

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: CI
on: push: branches: - release/* pull_request: branches: - release/* workflow_dispatch: issues: types: [opened]
jobs: lint: if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'gradle'
- name: Install google-services.json (from secret) env: GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} run: | echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Run Lint run: ./gradlew lint --parallel --build-cache
- name: Debug artifacts run: ls -R app/build/reports
- name: Upload html test report uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: lint-report path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html
- name: Clean sensitive files if: ${{ always() }} run: rm -f app/google-services.json
unit-test: if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') needs: [ lint ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'gradle'
- name: Install google-services.json (from secret) env: GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} run: | echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Run tests run: ./gradlew test --parallel --build-cache
- name: Upload test report uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: unit_test_report path: app/build/reports/tests/testDebugUnitTest/
- name: Clean sensitive files if: ${{ always() }} run: rm -f app/google-services.json
instrumentation-test: if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, 'Send QA') needs: [ unit-test ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest strategy: matrix: api-level: [ 29 ] steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'gradle'
- name: Install google-services.json (from secret) env: GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} run: | echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Enable KVM (acelera el emulador Android) run: | echo 'KERNEL=="kvm", GROUP="kvm", MODE="0666", OPTIONS+="static_node=kvm"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/99-kvm4all.rules sudo udevadm control --reload-rules sudo udevadm trigger --name-match=kvm
- name: Run espresso tests uses: reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2 with: api-level: 29 target: default arch: x86_64 profile: Nexus 6 emulator-options: -no-snapshot-save -no-window -gpu swiftshader_indirect -noaudio -no-boot-anim -camera-back none disable-animations: true script: ./gradlew connectedCheck --build-cache --stacktrace
- name: Upload test report if: always() uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: instrumentation_test_report path: app/build/reports/androidTests/connected/
- name: Clean sensitive files if: ${{ always() }} run: rm -f app/google-services.json
sonar: if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/main') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/') needs: [ instrumentation-test ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4 with: fetch-depth: 0
- name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'gradle'
- name: Install google-services.json (from secret) env: GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64 }} run: | echo -n "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON_BASE64" | base64 -d > app/google-services.json
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x ./gradlew
- name: Build debug + coverage only (avoid release signing in CI) run: ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest :app:jacocoTestReport :app:assembleDebug --parallel --build-cache
- name: Check SonarQube availability (self-hosted) env: SONAR_HOST_URL: ${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} run: | if [ -z "$SONAR_HOST_URL" ]; then echo "❌ Falta el secret SONAR_HOST_URL" exit 1 fi for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "SonarQube health check $i/5 -> $SONAR_HOST_URL" if curl -fsS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 20 "$SONAR_HOST_URL/api/system/status" > /dev/null; then echo "✓ SonarQube reachable" exit 0 fi sleep 8 done echo "❌ SonarQube unreachable from GitHub runner" exit 1
- name: SonarQube Scan (self-hosted) env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} run: | ./gradlew app:sonar \ -Dsonar.host.url=${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} \ -Dsonar.projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin \ -Dsonar.token=${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} \ -Dsonar.gradle.skipCompile=true \ --no-daemon
- name: Check SonarQube Quality Gate env: SONAR_HOST_URL: ${{ secrets.SONAR_HOST_URL }} SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }} run: | # SonarQube CE no soporta branch analysis -> no usar &branch= # Esperamos más tiempo para que el procesamiento del scan termine echo "⏳ Esperando que SonarQube procese el análisis..." sleep 20
QG_URL="${SONAR_HOST_URL}/api/qualitygates/project_status?projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin" echo "Consultando: $QG_URL"
# Capturar respuesta completa para debug RESPONSE=$(curl -s \ --user "${SONAR_TOKEN}:" \ --header "Accept: application/json" \ --connect-timeout 15 \ --max-time 30 \ "$QG_URL")
echo "Respuesta raw: $RESPONSE"
# Verificar que la respuesta es JSON válido if ! echo "$RESPONSE" | jq . > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "❌ La respuesta no es JSON válido (¿Cloudflare challenge?)" echo "Respuesta recibida: $RESPONSE" exit 1 fi
status=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.projectStatus.status // "NULL"') echo "Quality gate status: $status"
if [ "$status" = "OK" ]; then echo "✓ Quality gate passed" elif [ "$status" = "NONE" ] || [ "$status" = "NULL" ]; then echo "⚠️ Quality gate sin datos aún (primer análisis o sin cobertura configurada) — continuando" else echo "❌ Quality gate failed: $status" exit 1 fi
- name: Upload coverage report uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: coverage-report path: app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/jacocoTestReport.xml
- name: Upload APK for Firebase distribution uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: app-debug-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk retention-days: 1
- name: Clean sensitive files if: ${{ always() }} run: rm -f app/google-services.json
Firebase: needs: [ sonar ] runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout the code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Download APK artifact uses: actions/download-artifact@v4 with: name: app-debug-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/
- name: Set up Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: '18'
- name: Install Firebase CLI run: npm install -g firebase-tools
- name: Decode service account key run: | echo "${{ secrets.FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_BASE64 }}" | base64 -d > firebase-key.json
- name: Upload to Firebase App Distribution env: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS: ${{ github.workspace }}/firebase-key.json run: | firebase appdistribution:distribute app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \ --app ${{ secrets.FIREBASE_APP_ID }} \ --groups "qa" \ --release-notes "Versión enviada desde CI automáticamente."
- name: Clean up if: always() run: | rm -f firebase-key.json

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
# org.gradle.java.home=C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot # org.gradle.java.home - NO incluir rutas locales aqu?, GitHub Actions configura JAVA_HOME autom?ticamente via actions/setup-java # org.gradle.java.home=C:/Program Files/Eclipse Adoptium/jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot # gradle.properties (recomendado) org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx4096m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.management/sun.management=ALL-UNNAMED org.gradle.daemon=true org.gradle.parallel=true org.gradle.configureondemand=true org.gradle.caching=true org.gradle.configuration-cache=false
org.gradle.workers.max=8
# Kotlin / KSP incremental kotlin.incremental=true kotlin.compiler.execution.strategy=in-process kotlin.daemon.jvm.options=-Xmx2g --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED ksp.incremental=true
# Android / proyecto android.useAndroidX=true android.nonTransitiveRClass=true
# Sonar / Realm (mantener si las usas) sonar.sources=./src/main/java sonar.host.url=https://sonarqube.capibarafamily.online/ sonar.projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin APP_ID_REALM=app_service-guxerzw kotlin.jvm.target.validation.mode = IGNORE #org.gradle.java.home=C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot # org.gradle.java.home - NO incluir rutas locales aquí, GitHub Actions configura JAVA_HOME automáticamente via actions/setup-java # org.gradle.java.home=C:/Program Files/Eclipse Adoptium/jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot
kotlin.mpp.androidGradlePluginCompatibility.nowarn=true kotlin.native.ignoreDisabledTargets=true
org.gradle.console=plain kotlin.daemon.jvmargs=-Xmx2g --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# gradle.properties (recomendado) org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx4096m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.management/sun.management=ALL-UNNAMED org.gradle.daemon=true org.gradle.parallel=true org.gradle.configureondemand=true org.gradle.caching=true org.gradle.configuration-cache=false
org.gradle.workers.max=8
# Kotlin / KSP incremental kotlin.incremental=true kotlin.compiler.execution.strategy=in-process kotlin.daemon.jvm.options=-Xmx2g --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED ksp.incremental=true
# Android / proyecto android.useAndroidX=true android.nonTransitiveRClass=true
# Sonar / Realm (mantener si las usas) sonar.sources=./src/main/java sonar.host.url=http://localhost:9000 sonar.projectKey=Portfolio_kotlin APP_ID_REALM=app_service-guxerzw kotlin.jvm.target.validation.mode = IGNORE #org.gradle.java.home=C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot # org.gradle.java.home - NO incluir rutas locales aquí, GitHub Actions configura JAVA_HOME automáticamente via actions/setup-java # org.gradle.java.home=C:/Program Files/Eclipse Adoptium/jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot
kotlin.mpp.androidGradlePluginCompatibility.nowarn=true kotlin.native.ignoreDisabledTargets=true
org.gradle.console=plain kotlin.daemon.jvmargs=-Xmx2g --add-opens=java.base/java.lang.ref=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent.locks=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util.concurrent=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED

option.name: originalContent
option.value: ## This file is automatically generated by Android Studio. # Do not modify this file -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE ERASED! # # This file should *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\Vistony\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk #GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyC7Bd5kpdBYbugQ_iVFsMmw4oB9abG_mF8 GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyC7Bd5kpdBYbugQ_iVFsMmw4oB9abG_mF8 MODEL_NAME=gemini-2.0-flash # SonarQube local token (no commitear en git) SONAR_TOKEN=sqa_03d7edaae973c8a4fb1b681760a85b1fa8107c0f

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: ## This file is automatically generated by Android Studio. # Do not modify this file -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE ERASED! # # This file should *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\Vistony\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk #GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyC7Bd5kpdBYbugQ_iVFsMmw4oB9abG_mF8 GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyC7Bd5kpdBYbugQ_iVFsMmw4oB9abG_mF8 MODEL_NAME=gemini-2.0-flash # SonarQube local token (no commitear en git) SONAR_TOKEN=sqa_03d7edaae973c8a4fb1b681760a85b1fa8107c0f SONAR_HOST_URL=http://localhost:9000

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
